name: stark
description: UI/UX design plugin for AI coding agents. Routes product flow, platform idiom, originality, motion, assets, and tokens before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-platform UI/UX design skills for AI coding agents.
interface.longDescription: stark helps AI coding agents design from product flow, platform, native/cross-platform track, originality, assets, motion, and reference analysis before generating code. It includes UX, web, Windows, Apple, Android, cross-platform design, design-token skills, references, commands, curated proof assets, and small helper scripts.
defaultPrompt: Make this desktop app actually original.
Improve the onboarding UX for this app.
Audit this UI for AI slop.
